reference: Hi, I understand your concerns. Looking at your sonography, it appears normal. I think you will not have any problem conceiving, as one ovary appears to have a follicle that can ovulate, and your endometrial thickness is within the normal range. Continue your follicular study and get back to us.
text: Hi, I need to state your concerns: looking at your sonography, it appears normal. I think you will not have any problems with feeding, as one over it appears to have a follicle that's not big, and your endometrial thickness is within the normal range. Continue your follicular study and get back to us.
